scanner.description: Name and version of the scanner

Category Mappings.description: If enabled, appends ":CATEGORY", ":DISCOURAGED", etc. to the end of CWE numbers

Duplicate Scanner Consolidation.description: If enabled, identifies duplicate findings for results from identical scanners. This option might significantly increase completion time, so it is recommended to leave it disabled unless there is a need for deduplication of findings from the same scanner.

Preflight Rules.description: If enabled, changes final output values according to user-defined rules

Default Preflight Rules.description: If enabled, changes final output values according to a default profile of rules. Only activated if "Preflight Rules" flag is also true.

SARIF STITCH Properties.description: By default, SARIF format will output without CVSS properties such as Confidence, Exploit Maturity, Environmental Metrics, etc. To include these properties, set this flag to true.
